name: io.github.alex-jb/shadow-mentor
title: Shadow Mentor
description: Banking compliance council MCP server. 8 tools including Ed25519 attestation verifier, hash-chain audit, reason-code dictionary, Judge Card protocol (arXiv:2605.06161), GAICF adverse-action drafter (arXiv:2607.04103), Splunk CIM + ArcSight CEF SIEM export. 1016 tests. SR 26-2 footnote 3 delegation. Regulatory anchors: Reg B / ECOA §701, BSA / PATRIOT §326, FinCEN CDD, GDPR Art. 22 + Schufa C-634/21, Reg BI.
